pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: One membership with full access to every palette plotting tool on web and mobile.

boards.title: 4-Board Life System
boards.description: Vision, home, office, and mood boards plus The Plan — drag-and-drop artboards, themed images, private uploads, and AI action reminders.

journal.title: Journal & Timeline
journal.description: Capture notes, milestones, and the story of your rebrand in one place.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.description: Weekly goals, inspired actions, and a clear view of what you actually followed through on.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us an email and we'll respond as soon as possible.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about palette plotting

whatIs.question: What is palette plotting?
whatIs.answer: palette plotting is a digital life-organization platform built around four boards — vision, home, office, and mood — plus The Plan. Use it to plot your rebrand visually, stay organized, and track progress over time. For a concise tour, read What is palette plotting?.

notTherapy.question: Is palette plotting therapy or medical support?
notTherapy.answer: No. palette plotting is not a provider of mental-health, medical, psychological, legal, or financial advice. If you need clinical or emergency support, contact appropriate services.

whoCanUse.question: Who can use palette plotting?
whoCanUse.answer: Users must be 18 years or older.

automated.question: Does palette plotting use automated features?
automated.answer: Some features may use automated or system-generated responses to support your reflection, prompts, or audio creation. These are supplemental tools, not professional advice.

privacy.question: Is my content private?
privacy.answer: Yes. Your journals, reflections, audio creations, and notes are private.

plans.question: What subscription plans are available?
plans.answer: palette plotting offers monthly and annual subscription options. Refunds for iOS in-app purchases are at Apple's discretion. Refunds for all non-Apple purchases are at palette plotting's discretion. See Billing & Refund Policy for details.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
cancel.answer: Yes. You may cancel anytime through your account settings. Your plan remains active until the end of the billing period.

sellData.question: Will you sell my information?
sellData.answer: No. We do not sell your personal data.

deleteAccount.question: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: You may request deletion through the app or by contacting: support@paletteplot.com

acceptableUse.question: What happens if I violate the Acceptable Use Policy?
acceptableUse.answer: We may limit or suspend your access to maintain a safe and respectful environment.

legalTerms.question: Where can I read the legal terms?
legalTerms.answer: Links to the Terms of Use, Privacy Policy, and Acceptable Use Policy appear in the app and on our website. For copyright concerns, please see our DMCA Notice & Takedown Policy.

meta.title: Home | palette plotting
meta.description: palette plotting is your digital 4-board life system — three focus boards plus The Plan, with drag-and-drop editing, reminders, and more tools when you need them.
meta.ogDescription: Organize your life on four boards. Digital companion to acrylic boards at paletteplot.com.
meta.twitterDescription: Three focus boards + The Plan. Drag-and-drop editor, themed images, AI reminders, iCal export.

hero.freeTrialLine: Free on the web · pairs with acrylic boards at paletteplot.com
hero.subhead2: Themed image library + your private photos
hero.subhead3: AI action reminders · email · SMS · iCal export
hero.freeTrialUnderBadges: Also available on iOS and Android

practiceSection.body: palette plotting is a life-organization and moodboard system. Plot three focus areas, lock in The Plan, and keep journaling and progress tracking in the same membership.

items.quote: I had acrylic boards on my wall but kept screenshotting inspo at 2am anyway. Having the same four-board structure on my laptop finally made the system stick — focus boards for vibes, The Plan for what I actually do this week.
items.name: Maya T.

items.quote: The drag-and-drop editor is simple but purpose-built. I dumped my career board images in, pulled themes with AI, and scheduled email nudges for the plan steps I'd been avoiding.
items.name: Devon K.

items.quote: Boards is the home base now. Everything I care about lives in one workspace instead of ten half-started lists.
items.name: Jade L.
